seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Minyirr and Mira Mar. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Minyirr vs Mira Mar: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Minyirr and Mira Mar.
heading: Minyirr vs Mira Mar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Minyirr, Western Australia and Mira Mar, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Minyirr has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mira Mar (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Minyirr or Mira Mar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Minyirr has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Mira Mar scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Minyirr scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Mira Mar scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Minyirr or Mira Mar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Minyirr has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
